title: phyllanthus glaucinus
intro: Phyllanthus glaucinus, also known as the golden wight, is a species of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, treating liver and kidney disorders, and alleviating symptoms of diabetes. In traditional herbal preparations, Phyllanthus glaucinus is often used as a decoction or tincture, and can be consumed as a tea or added to other herbal remedies to enhance its medicinal properties.
